title: Informix
text: Informix The Informix DBMS connector enables you to integrate Informix databases with Uniface. Connector Feature Description Mnemonic INF Supported version For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Note: Transaction Manager (TM) support is not available in the current Uniface release. Supported utilities Create Table is supported. SQL support Supported. Stored procedures support Supported.
